Interface ILutFilter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a LookUp Table filter.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("D6358C16-C5F9-46C9-8283-952D79F3C2D5")]
public interface ILutFilter
